title: commonworld Commons atlas foundation
goal: Establish commonworld.net as a separate public Commons atlas repository with a contract-first catalog, visual proof slices, governance, and a later explicit handoff to weltgewebe.
completion: The commonworld repository has a validated CommonProject contract and curated seed examples.
The mixed-node marker and aspect-colored detail panel have a static visual proof.
The MapLibre place view and focused digital Commons view are implemented as bounded proofs.
Source, curation, privacy and taxonomy governance are documented.
The weltgewebe handoff boundary is explicit and disabled-by-default until compatible.

metadata.product_boundary: commonworld discovers and explains; weltgewebe administers and coordinates

lifecycle_reconcile.reason: activated because registered tasks remain open

metadata.completion_summary: Commonworld Atlas v1 registered tasks are verified: initial repo, mixed-node proof, map proof, Aether proof, governance/handoff boundary, map smoke, static catalog/API/search contracts and static search proof fixtures.
